name: csxq0605-plugins
description: Personal Claude Code plugins marketplace — 8 plugins covering dev workflows, academic research, incident response, and more.

plugins.name: dev-flow
plugins.description: Unified development workflow — project onboarding, dependency audit, code review (6 perspectives), changelog generation, ADR, and cross-session memory in one integrated plugin.

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Academic research workflow — multi-source literature search (arXiv, Semantic Scholar), citation network analysis, subtopic decomposition, and structured synthesis.

plugins.name: outreach
plugins.description: Academic outreach automation — CV parsing, professor research, visual reports, and personalized email generation.

plugins.name: email
plugins.description: Email sending and receiving plugin — IMAP/SMTP support for multiple providers (PKU, Tsinghua, Gmail, Outlook, QQ, 163).

plugins.name: multi-agent
plugins.description: Multi-agent team coordination — lead/teammate roles, inbox sync protocol, shared task list, and two-step shutdown.

plugins.name: atlas
plugins.description: Codebase knowledge atlas — multi-agent parallel exploration to map architecture, data flows, dependencies, and patterns.

plugins.name: incident-response
plugins.description: Structured incident response — triage, diagnose, fix, verify, postmortem. Timeline tracking and automated report generation.

plugins.name: migrator
plugins.description: Framework migration assistant — analyze codebase, generate migration plans, execute step by step with verification.
